---
title: "City of Laramie, Wyoming"
year: 1
image: /images/laramie_WY.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Laramie, Wyoming"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Landfill/Disposal", "Service Procurement"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# Solid Waste Rate Setting

TODO: Contents

# Recycling Service Procurement

Bell & Associates assisted the City of Laramie with the implementation and cost
calculation of a comingled recycling program utilizing 95 gallon roll carts. A
critical aspect of this project was the procurement of material processing
services. Mr. Bell drafted the RPF that requested services and solutions. The
result of the service procurement was a long-term contract with an out-of-state
service provider for transport and processing of a single stream recycling mix.

[By Catlin Mary Ann Miller - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=73284095)
:::
